basic_details.job_title: Bank of India Financial Literacy Counsellor Recruitment 2026 - Apply Offline
basic_details.short_information: Bank of India (BOI) has published the Financial Literacy Counsellor Notification 2026 on 2026. The recruitment drive aims to fill 1 Financial Literacy Counsellor position. Candidates within the age range of up to 64 years and holding a Graduate / Post Graduate degree from a UGC recognized University with proficiency in the local language (reading, writing, speaking), preferably retired Bank Officers in Scale I and above with rural credit and branch experience are eligible to apply offline at Bank of India Official Website. The application process will be active until 25-05-2026, and candidates

age_limit.details: Maximum Age Limit: 64 years as on 25-05-2026.

qualification.education_qualification: Graduate / Post graduate degree from UGC recognized University, Proficiency in local language (reading, writing, speaking and understanding), Retired Bank Officer in Scale I and above preferred, Background of rural credit and branch exposure preferred, Integrity not doubtful during service
qualification.details: Graduate / Post graduate degree from UGC recognized University. Proficiency in local language (reading, writing, speaking). Preferably Retired Bank Officers Scale I and above with rural credit and branch experience. Ex-Serviceman if no retired bank officer.

salary_details.details: Rs. 26,000/- per month + Rs. 500/- telephone expense + Rs. 3500/- conveyance expense

how_to_apply: Candidates who wish to apply for Bank of India Financial Literacy Counsellor Recruitment 2026 through offline mode should follow the steps below.
Read the official notification carefully before applying.
Download the application form from the official website: www.bankofindia.co.in.
Fill the application form carefully with correct information.
Attach self-attested copies of required documents such as photograph, signature, ID proof, and certificates.
Check all details carefully before submission.
Send the completed application form to the address mentioned in the notification through Speed Post / Registered Post or as instructed.
Ensure the application reaches before the last date: 25-05-2026.
Keep a photocopy of the submitted application form for future reference.

faq.question: Q1. What is the last date to apply for the Bank of India Financial Literacy Counsellor position?
faq.answer: The last date to submit the application for the Financial Literacy Counsellor post is 25th May 2026. Ensure your application reaches the specified address before this date.

faq.question: Q2. What is the educational qualification required for this post?
faq.answer: Candidates must hold a Graduate or Post Graduate degree from a UGC recognized University. Proficiency in the local language is also essential.

faq.question: Q3. Is there any age limit for the Financial Literacy Counsellor role?
faq.answer: Yes, the maximum age limit for this position is 64 years as of 25th May 2026.

faq.question: Q4. What is the salary offered for the Financial Literacy Counsellor position?
faq.answer: The selected candidate will receive a monthly salary of Rs. 26,000/- along with additional allowances for telephone and conveyance expenses.

faq.question: Q5. What is the application process for this recruitment?
faq.answer: The application process is offline. Candidates need to download the application form, fill it correctly, and send it to the official address mentioned in the notification.

faq.question: Q6. Are there any application fees for the Financial Literacy Counsellor post?
faq.answer: No, there are no application fees mentioned for any category (General/OBC, SC/ST) for this recruitment.

faq.question: Q7. What is the selection process for the Financial Literacy Counsellor role?
faq.answer: The selection process for the Financial Literacy Counsellor post will be based on an Interview.

faq.question: Q8. Which specific location is this recruitment for?
faq.answer: This recruitment is for the Keonjhar city in Odisha state.

faq.question: Q9. What type of job is this?
faq.answer: The job is on a contractual basis.

faq.question: Q10. Who is preferred for the Financial Literacy Counsellor post?
faq.answer: Retired Bank Officers in Scale I and above, with a background in rural credit and branch exposure, are preferred. Integrity not doubtful during service is also a key preference.
